summary.text: Senior platform engineer delivering Python backend services, FastAPI REST APIs, PostgreSQL data models, and React dashboards on AWS for internal operations platforms.

bullets.text: Built Python backend services and FastAPI REST APIs for internal case management workflows, cutting manual review time by 42%.
Designed PostgreSQL data models and audit tables for resume matching pipelines processing more than 3 million records each month.
Shipped ReactJS and TypeScript dashboards used by QA analysts to inspect matching output, exceptions, and approval queues.
Owned AWS deployments, CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes rollouts, and Datadog monitoring across four production services.
Implemented Kafka event streaming for ingestion jobs and GraphQL integrations for internal admin tooling.
Built Python services and Postgres reporting jobs for analytics operations.
Built a React and TypeScript dashboard for replaying ATS scoring and rewrite traces.
